title: leptochloa calycina
intro: Leptochloa calycina, also known as a species of grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Leptochloa calycina is used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leptochloa calycina are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Leptochloa calycina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices for its medicinal use.
